# planning

## What This Workspace Is
New ICM workspace. Specs say WHAT to build (L4); architecture/decisions capture stable reasoning (L3).
Architecture mirrors the existing `../docs/architecture/`.

## What to Load
| Task | Load These | Skip These |
|------|-----------|------------|
| Write a feature spec | the goal; `../docs/architecture/` if it touches structure | `src/`, `docs/guides` |
| Record a decision (ADR) | the options considered | everything else |

## What NOT to Do
- Don't put implementation code here — that's `src/`.
